song.title: Recall How David Swore
song.lyrics:
[V1] .D F#m Recall how David swore, . G A “I’ll not come into my house, . D F#m Nor go up to my bed, . G A Give slumber to mine eyelids,|| . G D Until I find a place for Thee, .Em A F#m Bm A place, O Lord, for Thee.” . Em D G D Our mighty God desires a home . G A D Where all His own may come.
[V2] How blinded we have been, Shut in with what concerns us; While God’s house lieth waste - Lord, break through, overturn us;|| We’ll go up to the mountain, Bring wood and build the house; We’ll never say, “Another day!” It’s time! We’ll come and build!
[V3] O Lord, against these days, Inspire some for Your building, Just as in Ezra’s day -- A remnant who are willing|| To come and work in Your house, Oh what a blessed charge! Your hearts desire, is our desire -- We come, O Lord to build. .. .. .. .. --- [V4] Within those whom You’d call Put such a restless caring For building to give all -- These times are for preparing;|| The gates of hell cannot prevail Against the builded church! The hours are few, the builders too -- Lord, build, O build in us!
